mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, app_account_id, filing_type, filing_status, filing_no, filing_subject, filing_app_name, filing_domain, filing_ip, filing_certificate_path, apply_time, audit_time, rejection_reason, expire_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM registry_app_filing_record
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND app_account_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.appAccountId}, '%')
AND filing_type LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.filingType}, '%')
AND filing_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.filingStatus}, '%')
AND filing_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.filingNo}, '%')
AND filing_subject LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.filingSubject}, '%')
AND filing_app_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.filingAppName}, '%')
AND apply_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.applyTime}, '%')
